scenes.supernova_script:
Male narrator says: All animals are equal, but some animals are more important than others, [All animals are equal, but some animals are more important than others,]
Female app voice says: Equal. समान। [Equal. Same.]
scenes.scene_summary:
- Introduces the app's reading and pronunciation practice interface.
- Demonstrates instant Hindi-to-English vocabulary help for learners.
- Establishes a practical, daily learning habit with the Supernova banner.
scenes.supernova_on_screen_text:
रोज़ 10 मिनट Supernova के साथ English Practice (Practice English 10 minutes a day with Supernova)
"All animals are equal, but some animals are more important than others," one of them read slowly.
The animals stood silent in the cold night, staring at the wall. They tried to remember the old words, but something felt wrong. No one spoke. The farm looked the same as always, yet nothing was the same anymore.
equal / ˈiːkwəl / समान (equal) / मुझे पता है (Already know) / सीखें (Learn)

scenes.supernova_script:
Male narrator says: one of them read slowly. [one of them read slowly.]
Female app voice says: Slowly. धीरे से। [Slowly. Slowly.]
Male narrator says: The animals stood silent in the cold night, staring at the wall. [The animals stood silent in the cold night, staring at the wall.]
Female app voice says: Cold. ठंडा। [Cold. Cold.]
Male narrator says: They tried to remember the old words, [They tried to remember the old words,]
Female app voice says: To try. कोशिश करना। [To try. To try.]
Female app voice says: Word. शब्द। [Word. Word.]
Male narrator says: but something felt wrong. [but something felt wrong.]
Female app voice says: Something. कुछ। [Something. Something.]
Male narrator says: No one spoke. The farm looked the same as always, [No one spoke. The farm looked the same as always,]
Female app voice says: Farm. खेत। [Farm. Farm.]
Female app voice says: Always. हमेशा। [Always. Always.]
Male narrator says: yet nothing was the same anymore. [yet nothing was the same anymore.]
scenes.scene_summary:
- Continues the interactive reading exercise, showing how seamlessly the AI tutor assists.
- Reinforces the Hindi-medium learning approach by providing clear, instant translations.
- Keeps the user engaged with continuous, frictionless feedback.
scenes.supernova_on_screen_text:
रोज़ 10 मिनट Supernova के साथ English Practice (Practice English 10 minutes a day with Supernova)
ANIMAL FARM - GEORGE ORWELL (एनिमल फार्म - जॉर्ज ओरवेल)
"All animals are equal, but some animals are more important than others," one of them read slowly.
The animals stood silent in the cold night, staring at the wall. They tried to remember the old words, but something felt wrong. No one spoke. The farm looked the same as always, yet nothing was the same anymore.
slowly / ˈsloʊli / धीरे से (slowly)
cold / koʊld / ठंडा (cold)
to try / tu traɪ / कोशिश करना (to try)
word / wɜːrd / शब्द (word)
something / ˈsʌmθɪŋ / कुछ (something)
farm / fɑːrm / खेत (farm)
always / ˈɔːlweɪz / हमेशा (always)
मुझे पता है (Already know) / सीखें (Learn)
